comfyui.webp_to_frames: anim_dump -prefix frame_ -folder frames/<shot_id> clips/<shot_id>.webp  (ffmpeg libwebp demuxer chokes on ComfyUI webps)
comfyui.note: zeroscope_v2_576w replaced the DAMO ModelScope checkpoint to remove the baked-in shutterstock watermark. 384x384 keeps the required 1:1 square, fits the 2080 Ti at 24f, B&W holds. Rollback: DAMO at /mnt/storage/comfyui/models/text2video/text2video_pytorch_model.damo.pth.

style.suffix: , black and white, grainy vintage analog television footage, 1970s broadcast, retro futurism, low resolution, washed out, soft focus
style.negative: shutterstock, watermark, text, caption, logo, color, colour, modern, smartphone, digital screen, hd, 4k, sharp, blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, extra fingers

subtitles.note: Better VCR (public-domain VCR OSD font). Burn via ffmpeg subtitles filter with fontsdir set.

music.note: Theme music disabled for this standalone ad bit (the big-band bed is for full-episode intros/outros, not a single segment). Flip enabled to true and add beds if a music bookend is wanted.

walter.core: Walter Cronkite, older television news anchor, balding grey hair, thin grey mustache, dark suit and tie, seated at a news desk in front of a bookshelf, reporting gravely

everwell.core: a polished pale-wood casket pod standing upright in a softly lit funeral showroom, a single round glowing dial set into its closed lid, brass fittings, an ominous calm household appliance, the dial faintly glowing

broll.showroom: a dim funeral home showroom lined with upright caskets, soft display lamps, thick carpet, long shadows

title_assets.macu_report_title: episodes/everwell-bit/titles/macu_report_title.mp4 (reuse the EP5 Hyperframes title render; copy into this episode's titles/ dir before assembly)
title_assets.macu_report_bumper: episodes/everwell-bit/titles/macu_report_bumper.mp4 (~1.5s trimmed cut of the title; reuse from EP5)

episode_defaults.render_rule: For each shot: full_prompt = prompt_core + style.suffix; negative = style.negative; seed = shot.seed. Run via comfyui.workflow with cold-start fire-and-poll. For each cue: POST {text: vo} to voice.endpoint -> vo/<cue_id>.wav. Sequence shots in cue order; per-shot screen duration = cue VO duration / number of shots. Apply the analog-jank filtergraph per shot, RIFE 3x interpolate, concat, mux VO, (music disabled for this bit), burn subs (Better VCR font) from vo text -> final/everwell-bit.mp4.
